opportunities.description:
[HIRING] Software Engineer, API SDK - OpenAI

**Software Engineer, API SDK**: Develop and maintain OpenAI's official SDKs powering its leading AI development platform. Responsibilities include designing optimal SDK experiences for new API features, supporting multi-language compatibility (Python, Node.js, Golang, Java, Ruby), and enhancing developer experience. Required skills: SDK design, proficiency in multiple programming languages, familiarity with AI development platforms, and a passionate commitment to improving the world through AI.
